features.name: typedef union packed with logic vector members
features.description: Code should include a typedef union packed declaration with logic vector members used as module ports
features.snippet: typedef union packed { logic [31:0] a; logic [31:0] b; } my_union;

features.name: packed union type as module input port
features.description: Code should include a module with an input port declared using a packed union typedef

features.name: packed union type as module output port
features.description: Code should include a module with an output port declared using a packed union typedef

features.name: packed union passed through module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a packed union variable passed to a submodule through named port connection during instantiation
